Home.whoAmIContent: Senior Software Developer with 20 years of hands-on experience delivering reliable, scalable, and business-critical solutions. I specialize in microservices and backend architecture using C#, .NET, Node.js, SQL, and Message Brokers (Kafka, RabbitMQ), with deep expertise in TypeScript and React. Currently integrating AI (Groq) into my projects using Flutter.

Contact.title: Contact with me
Contact.subtitle: You can also get in touch with me through this form below.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent successfully! I will get back to you shortly.
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again or use the email link.

aiMobileAssistant.title: AI Mobile Assistant – Smart AI Chat
aiMobileAssistant.desc: An Android AI chat assistant powered by Groq API with Llama 4 Scout vision model. Features text chat with full context, image analysis (up to 5 photos), voice input in 3 languages (EN/RU/DE), chat history with search, usage statistics, and Material 3 dark theme.

germanTutor.title: Deutsch Lernen – German Learning App
germanTutor.desc: A comprehensive Android app for learning German, built for migrants in Switzerland. Features 10,000+ vocabulary words (A1–C2), 1,000+ phrases, 180 grammar rules with 1,400+ exercises, 120 quizzes, 120 dictation texts, and 37 listening exercises. Includes AI chat tutor (Groq/Gemini/OpenAI), speaking practice with voice input, flashcards with FSRS v5 spaced repetition, progress tracking with streaks, 10-language UI, dark mode, and text-to-speech.

jobHunter.title: Jobich – Smart Job Aggregator
jobHunter.desc: One search across 30+ job boards in Switzerland. 12,000+ active vacancies updated every 2 hours via a standalone Python parser (LinkedIn, jobs.ch, Indeed, Jobup, Workday and more), covering all 16 industry domains across every canton. Features an interactive SVG canton map, smart filters by employment type, work mode, and language, email subscription for daily alerts, AI-powered relevance scoring, PDF export with clickable links, and a 7-language UI (EN, DE, FR, IT, ES, RU, UA). Built with React + Vite frontend, Serverless Functions backend, and Neon PostgreSQL database. Developed as a team project with product/QA and legal/compliance roles.

foreteller.title: Foreteller – Cosmic Wisdom
foreteller.desc: A mystical web application dedicated to cosmic wisdom available in 6 languages. Features include Universal Wisdom (Zodiac, Chinese Horoscope), interactive Pythagoras Square, and AI-powered character analysis using Llama-4 via Groq API. Users can generate high-quality PDF reports and enjoy a responsive 'Cosmic Glass' design.

bizLingo.title: BizLingo AI – Fast AI-Powered Language Learning
bizLingo.desc: A high-performance interactive web application for mastering Business English and German. It leverages Groq API for near-instant translation validation and intelligent feedback, providing a smooth and responsive learning experience.

careerCoach.title: AI Career Coach – Intelligent Resume & Job Analyzer
careerCoach.desc: An AI-powered tool for deep resume-to-job matching analysis. It leverages AI models via Groq API to generate critical reports and interview preparation roadmaps using CLS, TRS, and HGLS methodologies.

itemFlow.title: Item Flow – Full-Stack TypeScript Application
itemFlow.desc: A comprehensive full-stack project demonstrating modern development practices from conception to deployment. Includes a complete codebase migration from JavaScript to TypeScript, responsive design using Material-UI's sx prop, and integration with Cloudinary for scalable image storage.

fuehrerschein.title: Führerschein Schweiz – Driving Theory Exam Prep
fuehrerschein.desc: A web app for preparing for the Swiss driving license theory exam (Category B). Features 100 questions per language across 10 topic categories (speed limits, right-of-way, traffic signs, parking, motorway rules, and more). Includes explanations with references to Swiss traffic law articles (SVG/VRV), question shuffling, mid-test language switching, and a 90% pass threshold. Supports 5 languages: German, English, Russian, Ukrainian, and Spanish.

interviewQuizzes.title: Interview Quizzes
interviewQuizzes.desc: A collection of 500 self-assessment questions for technical interview preparation. Covers C#, .NET, SOLID, Clean Architecture, Design Patterns, SQL, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Behavioral & Agile, and AI & Agents. Supports 4 languages.

nasa.title: NASA Space Apps Challenge Participant
nasa.desc: Collaborated in an international team during a 48-hour hackathon to solve a real-world challenge presented by NASA. Contributed to the development of a meaningful project prototype by blending technology, science, and space-related data.
